arts.ttl: Parma vs. Juventus to bring matchday 33 to an end
arts.sum: Parma drew the reverse game against Juventus this season (2-2); the Ducali could avoid defeat in both Serie A matches against the Bianconeri for the first time in the competition since 2010-11 (W2). Among the teams in the bottom half of the table, only Como have won more points (17) than Parma (16) against opponents currently in the top half of the table; furthermore, the Gialloblù have remained unbeaten in each of the last four of these matches (draw against Fiorentina, Inter, Torino and win against Bologna).
